result.finding: validation/structural_adequacy_fit.py: CONSTRAINED fit (per-congener f_xy + global L_Ph=3.2e-3 + global kappa_d=2.05; 13 params / 33 obs, DOF 20) vs Yamazaki. Per-tissue log10 RMSE: STRAW 0.048 (reproduced across the WHOLE series incl. long chains PFUnDA 8.18/8.16, PFDoDA 34/49), root 0.384 (within ~2-3x on one global kappa_d), GRAIN 0.987 (short over ~10x: PFBA 11 vs 1; long under ~75x: PFDoDA 0.6 vs 46). Overall 0.612 (vs saturated W2 0.029 at DOF 0; a-priori 0.84). => structure reproduces SHOOT translocation under a constrained fit; GRAIN does not (needs per-congener phloem loading).
